name: PI Inbound WhatsApp Bot — Sunshine Injury Law

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action:'book', silent:true, phone: $('Code: Decide').item.json.phone, name: $('Code: Decide').item.json.name, email: $('Code: Decide').item.json.email, chosen_slot: $('Code: Decide').item.json.chosen_slot }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action:'qualify', silent:true, phone: $('Code: Decide').item.json.phone, name: $('Code: Decide').item.json.name, email: $('Code: Decide').item.json.email, case_description: $('Code: Decide').item.json.accumulated, preferred_date: '' }) }}

parameters.content:
## Inbound WhatsApp Bot (v3.1)
Two-way chat over WhatsApp.
1. Point Twilio Sandbox 'When a message comes in' → POST this workflow's /webhook/pi-inbound.
2. Conversation state is kept IN MEMORY (n8n workflow static data, keyed by phone digits) — NO Google Sheet and NO credentials needed on this workflow.
3. Reuses the main funnel at https://josesn8n.win/webhook/pi-intake (silent:true) for qualify/book — single-sourced compliance + booking.
4. Replies via TwiML. ACTIVATE the workflow — static data only persists for active (production) runs, not manual test executions.
